Trigger/Action: TRIGGER: Form submitted OR Landing page visited OR Lead magnet downloaded OR Ad clicked
Tool/System: Unbounce / Leadpages / Instapage / Form webhook / Ad platform pixel
Data_Fields: trigger_type, timestamp, lead_source, campaign_id, referrer_url, device_type

Trigger/Action: Capture lead data (name, email, phone, company, source, UTM params) automatically
Data_Fields: name, email, phone, company, website, form_responses, ip_address

Trigger/Action: Enrich lead profile with data appending (job title, company size, industry, LinkedIn)
Data_Fields: job_title, company_size, industry, revenue_range, technologies, linkedin_url

Trigger/Action: Score lead based on demographic fit, engagement level, behavioral signals, intent data
Tool/System: HubSpot / Salesforce / Marketo / Custom ML scoring model

Trigger/Action: DECISION: Lead meets qualification criteria (ICP fit, engagement threshold)?
Tool/System: Qualification rules engine / ICP matching algorithm

Trigger/Action: IF YES: Auto-assign to sales rep based on territory, industry, deal size, availability
Tool/System: CRM routing rules / Round-robin / Territory mapping / Chili Piper

Trigger/Action: IF NO: Route to nurture workflow and continue lead development
Tool/System: Marketing automation nurture queue / Drip campaign assignment

Log complete attribution (source, campaign, keywords, content) in CRM

Data_Fields: crm_record_id, source_campaign, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, first_touch

Tool/System: Slack/SMS integration / Outreach / Salesloft / Instant notification

Tool/System: Website tracking (Segment, Google Analytics) / Engagement scoring

Tool/System: Dynamic lead scoring / Engagement decay / Predictive scoring

Tool/System: Scarcity campaigns / Social proof automation / Countdown timers
